title: CMS INDUSLAW acts on Recode Solutions ₹117 crore proposed IPO
description: Intellius Recode Limited, dba Recode Solutions, has proposed an initial public offering of equity shares comprising a fresh issue of upto ₹117 crore and an offer for sale comprising of upto 1,290,000 equity shares.CMS INDUSLAW is advising Recode Solutions as well as Inga Ventures Private Limited, the book running lead manager, on this IPO.The transaction team consists of Mathew Thomas (Partner), Aman Bahl (Senior Associate), Shambhavi Kumar (Senior Associate), Associates Kirti Gohil, Khushi Dua,
